title: Bakening
summary: Bakening (Russian: Бакенинг) (also known as Bakenin (Russian: Бакенин)) is a stratovolcano located in the southern part of Kamchatka Peninsula, Russia.
text: Bakening (Russian: Бакенинг) (also known as Bakenin (Russian: Бакенин)) is a stratovolcano located in the southern part of Kamchatka Peninsula, Russia.
